rules.logic: Project restores degraded forest lands and demonstrates additionality using the UNFCCC barrier or investment analysis.
rules.text: Project restores degraded forest lands and meets additionality tests per Tool 01.
rules.title: Project restores degraded forest lands and meets additionality tests per Tool 01.
when: Target areas classified as degraded forest land prior to start date.
Additionality analysis completed per UNFCCC requirements.

rules.logic: Baseline net removals estimated using historical land-use/land-cover data and default parameters from Tool 02.
rules.text: Baseline net GHG removals derived from historical land-use data per Tool 02 guidance.
rules.title: Baseline net GHG removals derived from historical land-use data per Tool 02 guidance.
when: Default biomass parameters justified when field data absent.

rules.logic: Project emissions include fossil fuel consumption, biomass burning, and fertilizer use calculated with Tool 08 default factors.
rules.text: Project emissions include fossil fuel use, biomass burning, and fertilizer application as per Tool 08.
rules.title: Project emissions include fossil fuel use, biomass burning, and fertilizer application as per Tool 08.
when: Fuel consumption metered or logged with auditable records.
Fertilizer application data retained for verification.

rules.logic: Activity shifting and market leakage quantified annually with Tool 14 standardized coefficients.
rules.text: Leakage from activity shifting and market effects addressed using Tool 14 default factors.
rules.title: Leakage from activity shifting and market effects addressed using Tool 14 default factors.
when: Leakage monitoring plan implemented with annual review.
Leakage deductions applied before credit issuance.

rules.logic: Buffer contribution calculated with Tool 15 risk scoring and documented alongside issuance.
rules.text: Non-permanence buffer determined via Tool 15 risk analysis and recorded in registry accounts.
rules.title: Non-permanence buffer determined via Tool 15 risk analysis and recorded in registry accounts.
when: Updated risk assessment provided during verification.
Evidence of buffer account entries retained.

rules.logic: Plot network re-measured at ≤5-year intervals using standard mensuration and Tool 16 QA/QC checks.
rules.text: Permanent sample plots re-measured at least every five years per Tool 16 QA/QC guidance.
rules.title: Permanent sample plots re-measured at least every five years per Tool 16 QA/QC guidance.
when: Plot coordinates archived and accessible for re-measurement.
QA/QC procedures documented for each monitoring campaign.

rules.logic: Calculate combined sampling uncertainty and apply Tool 12 deductions when precision >10% at 90% confidence.
rules.text: Sampling uncertainty kept below 10% at 90% confidence or conservatively adjusted using Tool 12.
rules.title: Sampling uncertainty kept below 10% at 90% confidence or conservatively adjusted using Tool 12.
when: Deductions applied prior to credit issuance if threshold exceeded.

rules.logic: Monitoring reports include updated maps, field measurements, emission source logs, leakage deductions, and buffer transactions.
rules.text: Monitoring reports compile geospatial data, emissions sources, and buffer transactions with full audit trail.
rules.title: Monitoring reports compile geospatial data, emissions sources, and buffer transactions with full audit trail.
when: DOE confirms completeness of supporting records.
